agent.governance.override.description: Issue governance override for agent operations

agent.quota.update.description: Update agent operational quotas and limits

agent.register.description: Register new AI agents in the system

agent.terminate.description: Permanently terminate agents from the system

governance.audit.query.description: Query audit logs and compliance records

governance.emergency.halt.description: Emergency system halt — stops all operations

governance.oversight.review.description: Review overall system state and health

governance.proposal.create.description: Create governance proposals for system changes

identity.actor.create.description: Register new actors in the system

identity.actor.read.description: Query actor information and identity state

identity.actor.revoke.description: Permanently revoke actors from the system

identity.session.create.derivation_note: Derived from actor state — not explicitly granted. System issues session capability upon successful authentication.

identity.trust_anchor.create.description: Register trust anchors in the identity subsystem

intent.convert.description: Convert validated intent to executable command
intent.convert.restriction_note: System-internal only. No agent or human may hold this capability.

intent.enrich.description: Enrich intent with resolved context and parameters

intent.multi_step.advance.description: Advance multi-step intent to next stage

intent.read.description: Query intent state and processing status

intent.submit.description: Submit intents to the intent processor

ledger.account.read.description: Query account balances and ledger account state

ledger.entry.post.description: Post balanced entries to the general ledger

ledger.journal.create.description: Create journal entries in the ledger

ledger.journal.post.description: Post a balanced journal entry to the ledger

ledger.reconcile.description: Reconcile ledger accounts against external sources

payment.execution.execute.description: Execute planned payments through payment rails

payment.execution.plan.description: Plan payment execution routes and strategy

agent_execution_conditions: amount must not exceed per-payment limit
recipient must be in approved payee list
must comply with applicable policy rules
payment.initiate.description: Initiate external payments to external systems

payment.receipt.issue.description: Issue payment receipts for settled payments

payment.reconcile.description: Reconcile external payments with internal records

policy.compliance.create.description: Register compliance requirements in the policy subsystem

policy.rule.create.description: Create policy rules in the policy engine

policy.rule.read.description: Read policy rules and compliance requirements

policy.set.evaluate.description: Request policy evaluation against a policy set

system.internal.description: System-internal capability for automated pipeline operations
system.internal.restriction_note: Automatically assigned to system-internal pipeline steps. Not grantable to any actor.

agent_execution_conditions: must operate within configured rebalance tolerance
cross-pool transfers require prior governance approval
treasury.liquidity.manage.description: Manage liquidity pools and liquidity allocation

treasury.liquidity.read.description: Query liquidity pool state and allocations

treasury.transfer.cancel.description: Cancel pending or reserved treasury transfers

treasury.transfer.execute.description: Execute authorized and reserved treasury transfers

agent_execution_conditions: amount must not exceed per-transfer limit
cumulative daily amount must not exceed daily cap

treasury.transfer.reserve.description: Reserve funds for an authorized transfer

vault.asset.create.description: Register new assets in the vault

vault.asset.reject.description: Reject a registered asset that fails verification

vault.reserve.consume.description: Consume a locked reservation for a completed operation

vault.reserve.create.description: Create asset reservations against available balance

vault.reserve.lock.description: Lock a pending reservation, committing the value

agent_execution_conditions: delta must be within configured tolerance band
